name: Code Reviewer Agent
description: Reviews code snippets for bugs, security issues, and style improvements. Sandbox preview uses deterministic mock replies (no API keys).
starterMessages: Review this function: function add(a, b) { return a + b }
Is there a bug in: for (let i = 0; i <= arr.length; i++) {}
Check this for SQL injection: `SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ${userId}`
